items.title: Fun game, one problem
items.summary:
Ok, so i love the game, its not a bad card battler and i can definitely see the rouge-lite genes (namely Slay the Spire) in it. It feel fresh with the different aspects that the chars can be and it’s kinda really fun to build around those aspects. I also heavily vibe with the lovecraftian vibe. the issue i have with the game is that it seems to be poorly optimized with some aspects (it is auto translated and you can see it pretty well in some spots, but i don’t really care. it’s kinda funny) The main place i see optimization issues is with some effects in battle, namely the “extra turn” mechanic from the purple guys. idk but something about how it’s done makes me hemorrhage frames and sometimes fully crash too. even when optimized as much as i can, it’s not great.  I find it pretty displeasing cause one of my best ranked characters is that aspects and can definitely let me cause some mischief (which i enjoy greatly) I don’t have a high end phone but it’s definitely not low end either, so i hope this issue is fixed as it’s been and issue since launch.
Thanks
items.author: CosmicCato
